glosses.ro: a atinge ușor; a fi aproape de
glosses.ja: かすめる; 触れそうになる

sentences.target: Tu frôles la rampe en courant.

translations.fr: Tu frôles la rampe en courant.
translations.en: You brush the handrail while running.
translations.de: Du streifst das Geländer beim Laufen.
translations.yue: 你跑嗰陣輕輕掠過扶手。
translations.he: אתה נוגע קלות במעקה כשאתה רץ.
translations.vi: Bạn chạm nhẹ vào tay vịn khi chạy.
translations.ar: أنت تلامس الدرابزين بخفة أثناء الجري.
translations.nl: Je strijkt langs de leuning terwijl je rent.
translations.uk: Ти ледь зачіпаєш перила, коли біжиш.
translations.hi: दौड़ते समय तुम रेलिंग को हल्के से छूते हो.
translations.pl: Ocierasz się o poręcz, gdy biegniesz.
translations.el: Καθώς τρέχεις, ακουμπάς ελαφρά το κιγκλίδωμα.
translations.nb: Du stryker borti rekkverket når du løper.
translations.id: Kamu menyenggol pegangan tangga saat berlari.
translations.sv: Du snuddar vid räcket när du springer.
translations.ro: Atingi balustrada în timp ce alergi.
translations.cs: Při běhu se otíráš o zábradlí.
translations.da: Du strejfer gelænderet, mens du løber.
translations.ja: 走りながら手すりにかすっていく。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun; grammatical subject of 'frôles'.
Present indicative, 2nd person singular; main verb meaning 'graze/brush', taking 'la rampe' as direct object.
Definite article (feminine singular) introducing 'rampe'.
Common noun (fem.); direct object of 'frôles'.
Preposition introducing a gerund ('en courant'), forming an adverbial modifier of manner/time.
Present participle (gerund) of 'courir'; functions as an adverbial modifier meaning 'while running'.

sentences.target: On va frôler la limite de vitesse.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ va fʁole la limit də vitɛs/

translations.fr: On va frôler la limite de vitesse.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ va fʁole la limit də vitɛs/
translations.en: We're going to almost hit the speed limit.
translations.es: Vamos a rozar el límite de velocidad.
translations.de: Wir werden das Tempolimit beinahe erreichen.
translations.it: Stiamo per sfiorare il limite di velocità.
translations.ru: Мы будем ехать почти на пределе скорости.
translations.pt: Vamos roçar o limite de velocidade.
translations.vi: Chúng ta sẽ gần chạm tới giới hạn tốc độ.
translations.nl: We gaan hampir op de snelheidslimiet zitten.
translations.uk: Ми будемо майже на межі дозволеної швидкості.
translations.hi: हम गति सीमा को लगभग छूने वाले हैं.
translations.pl: Będziemy jechać prawie na limicie prędkości.
translations.el: Θα ακουμπήσουμε σχεδόν το όριο ταχύτητας.
translations.nb: Vi kommer til å ligge nesten på fartsgrensen.
translations.sv: Vi kommer att ligga nära hastighetsgränsen.
translations.ro: O să fim aproape de limita de viteză.
translations.cs: Budeme téměř na hranici povolené rychlosti.
translations.da: Vi kommer næsten op på fartgrænsen.
translations.ja: 制限速度ぎりぎりまで出すことになる。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/colloquial subject pronoun; grammatical subject of the auxiliary 'va'.
Auxiliary verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; used with an infinitive to form the near future.
Infinitive main verb complement to 'va' (near-future construction); takes 'la limite de vitesse' as its direct object.
Definite article (feminine singular) introducing 'limite'.
Common noun (fem.); head of the NP 'la limite de vitesse', direct object of 'frôler'.
Preposition introducing the noun complement 'vitesse' (genitive-like).
Common noun (fem.); complement of 'limite' headed by 'de'.

sentences.target: Je frôle la porte avec le carton.
sentences.reading: /ʒə fʁol la pɔʁt avɛk lə kaʁtɔ̃/

translations.fr: Je frôle la porte avec le carton.
translations.ipa: /ʒə fʁol la pɔʁt avɛk lə kaʁtɔ̃/
translations.en: I brush the door with the box.
translations.es: Rozo la puerta con la caja.
translations.de: Ich streife mit dem Karton die Tür.
translations.it: Sfioro la porta con la scatola.
translations.pt: Roço a porta com a caixa.
translations.he: אני נוגע קלות בדלת עם הקרטון.
translations.vi: Tôi chạm nhẹ vào cánh cửa bằng cái thùng.
translations.nl: Ik raak de deur even aan met de doos.
translations.hi: मैं डिब्बे से दरवाज़े को हल्के से छूता हूँ.
translations.el: Αγγίζω ελαφρά την πόρτα με το κουτί.
translations.nb: Jeg kommer borti døren med esken.
translations.sv: Jag snuddar vid dörren med lådan.
translations.ja: 箱でドアに軽く触れる。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun; grammatical subject of 'frôle'.
Present indicative, 1st person singular; main verb taking 'la porte' as direct object.
Definite article (feminine singular) introducing 'porte'.
Common noun (fem.); direct object of 'frôle'.
Preposition introducing an instrumental complement.
Definite article (masculine singular) introducing 'carton'.
Common noun (masc.); object of the preposition 'avec' (instrument).

sentences.target: Ils frôlent les murs pour passer.

translations.fr: Ils frôlent les murs pour passer.
translations.en: They brush the walls to get through.
translations.de: Sie streifen die Wände, um durchzukommen.
translations.ru: Они идут, задевая стены, чтобы пройти.
translations.pt: Eles roçam as paredes para passar.
translations.vi: Họ lướt sát tường để đi qua.
translations.nl: Ze strijken langs de muren om erdoor te komen.
translations.hi: वे दीवारों को छूते हुए निकलते हैं.
translations.pl: Ocierają się o ściany, żeby przejść.
translations.el: Ακουμπούν τους τοίχους για να περάσουν.
translations.nb: De stryker langs veggene for å komme forbi.
translations.sv: De snuddar vid väggarna för att ta sig igenom.
translations.cs: Otírají se o zdi, aby prošli.
translations.da: De strejfer væggene for at komme igennem.
translations.ja: 壁に体をすらせて通り抜ける。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person plural subject pronoun; grammatical subject of 'frôlent'.
Present indicative, 3rd person plural; main verb; 'les murs' is direct object.
Definite article (plural) introducing 'murs'.
Common noun (masc., plural); direct object of 'frôlent'.
Preposition of purpose introducing an infinitive clause.
Infinitive verb; complement to 'pour', expressing the aim ('to get by').
